rules.description: The room supplied does not exist.
Theatre event anaesthetist stock but no anaesthetist
Theatre event has gas but no gas
Theatre event non-consumables with zero quantity sugeon
Theatre event non-consumables with zero quantity anaesthetist
Theatre event non-consumables with zero quantity recovery
Theatre event stock missing pack size surgeon
Theatre event stock missing pack size surgeon
Theatre event stock missing pack size recovery
Theatre event stock with zero quantity surgeon
Theatre event stock with zero quantity anaesthetist
Theatre event stock with zero quantity recovery
A Practitioner has been duplicated in a role.
The Rich theatre scrub person name incomplete
The Rich theatre circulating person name incomplete
The Rich theatre anaesthic nurse name incomplete
An anaesthetist is required for capturing products.
An surgeon is required for capturing products.
Gases can't be greater than theatre time.
End date must be after start date
End Date must not be in the future
Start date must be after the admission date
End date must be after the discharge date
At least one product is required.
A preference card linked to a practitioner is required.
A preference card with at least one product is required.
A practitioner is required for preference card define card.
The preference card name must be unique.
The template name must be unique.
At least one preference card group is required.
The minor theatre scopes charge code
The major theatre scopes charge code

validations.rule_references: RICH_THEATRE_END_CUTTING_TIME_AFTER_START_CUTTING_TIME | RICH_THEATRE_END_CUTTING_TIME_OUT_OF_EVENT_RANGE | RICH_THEATRE_END_CUTTING_TIME_REQUIRED | RICH_THEATRE_END_DATE_AFTER_DISCHARGE_DATE | RICH_THEATRE_END_DATE_AFTER_START_DATE | RICH_THEATRE_END_DATE_IN_FUTURE | RICH_THEATRE_END_DATE_REQUIRED | RICH_THEATRE_OPERATING_ROOM_REQUIRED | RICH_THEATRE_OPERATING_ROOM_REQUIRED_FOR_CAPTURE | RICH_THEATRE_START_CUTTING_TIME_OUT_OF_EVENT_RANGE | RICH_THEATRE_START_CUTTING_TIME_REQUIRED | RICH_THEATRE_START_DATE_BEFORE_ADMISSION_DATE | RICH_THEATRE_START_DATE_REQUIRED | RICH_THEATRE_THEATRE_REQUIRED
validations.conditions: context.TheatreEvent.Theatre == null | context.TheatreEvent.OperatingRoom == null | context.TheatreEvent.StartDate == null | context.TheatreEvent.EndDate == null | context.TheatreEvent.StartDate > context.TheatreEvent.EndDate | context.TheatreEvent.EndDate > DateTime.Now | context.TheatreEvent.StartCuttingTime == null | context.TheatreEvent.EndCuttingTime == null | context.TheatreEvent.StartCuttingTime > context.TheatreEvent.EndCuttingTime | context.TheatreEvent.StartCuttingTime < context.TheatreEvent.StartDate || context.TheatreEvent.StartCuttingTime > context.TheatreEvent.EndDate | context.TheatreEvent.EndCuttingTime > context.TheatreEvent.EndDate || context.TheatreEvent.EndCuttingTime < context.TheatreEvent.StartDate | tag != null && tag.TagVisit.AdmissionDate.HasValue && context.TheatreEvent.StartDate.HasValue
context.TheatreEvent.NonConsumables.Any( p => p.NonConsumable.UnitOfMeasureDescription == MINUTES && p.Quantity > context.TheatreEvent.TheatreTimeInMinutes

theatreEventProductPackageType == TheatreEventProductPackageTypeCodeData.Surgeon | surgeon == null | theatreEventProductPackageType == TheatreEventProductPackageTypeCodeData.Anaesthetist | anaesthetist == null

context.TheatreEvent.OperatingRoom == null | surgeon == null || surgeon.PreferenceCard == null | context.TheatreEvent.OperatingRoom.StockRooms.Any(p => p.StockRoomIdentifier == surgeon.PreferenceCard.StockRoomIdentifier

!context.Trolley.ProductPackages.Any( | context.Trolley.ProductPackages .Any(p => p.Product.Packages.Count > 0 && p.Package == null | context.Trolley.ProductPackages.Any(p => p.IsNotVariable && p.Quantity <= 0 | duplicateProductCodes.Count > 0 | context.Trolley.StockRoom != null | unstockedProductCodes.Count > 0

context.Trolley.NonConsumables.Any( p => p.NonConsumable.NonConsumableCategory == NonConsumableCategoryCodeData.Equipment && p.Quantity <= 0 && p.NonConsumable.UnitOfMeasureDescription != Constants.EACH_DESCRIPTION | context.Trolley.NonConsumables.Any( p => p.NonConsumable.NonConsumableCategory == NonConsumableCategoryCodeData.Instrumentation && p.Quantity <= 0 && p.NonConsumable.UnitOfMeasureDescription != Constants.EACH_DESCRIPTION
